name: Aumiller Park
description: Come play pickleball at Aumiller Park in Bucyrus, OH! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Bucyrus Area YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Bucyrus Area YMCA in Bucyrus, OH! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Galion
description: Galion is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Galion, OH. There are 6 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Galion YMCA
description: Galion YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Galion, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Heise Park
description: Open Play, first come first served
open_play_schedule: Open play from dawn to dusk
